text: Worst services ever. Reception is very bad, it gets lost while on the phone... or there is no reception at all! And now the network is down?! Hate it!
Right the service is Down and nobody can fix it!

I wish I could give 0 stars. I switched our plan from Sprint to T-Mobile last month mainly because they had the phone I wanted that Sprint did not carry at the time. I also thought it would be an advantage that the companies were merging together. I have had nothing but horrible frustration from getting my phone set up properly to calls with customer service and tech support being consistently dropped, and having to start all over with a new person after waiting up to 1.20 hours to get through to the next "expert." Now, my husband's phone has been without ability to call or receive any calls for about 4 days despite being on line with tech support for over four hours. I don't look forward to continuing to resolve this matter. If anyone asks my opinion about phone carriers, I will gladly recommend to steer clear of T-Mobile based on my terrible experience.

If I could give them no stars I would. Filed a complaint with the BBB regarding them constantly contacting me prior to 8:00 AM PT after a recent move from the midwest only find that the genius les that made their automated system tied it to the area code of the phone number. Their solution was for me to change a number I've had for the last 15+ years, which is an unacceptable proposition due to the amount of contacts that would need to be notified. Now I still receive their superfluous bill notifications (with incorrect totals) at around 6:00 AM every day. This is in addition to the spotty coverage around Seattle suburbs.

Here's a breath of fresh air when dealing with a T-Mobile reps., I wanted to change my cell phone carrier, so I stop at 624 Tyvola Rd Ste.104 location for business.  Customer service was excellent from the store manager - Alfredo and Luz the cell phone rep.  These two individuals know their jobs..meaning I was porting over (Six Lines) over from two different carriers and they know how to transfer all of my phones which were different with no problems...and that was quite impressive!!! The manager Alfredo gave me some unbelievable deals that would include taxes if I  left AT&T, and do business with T-Mobile.  So, if you are needing excellent customer service, and knowledgeable rep.  working, and helping you, and possibly get you some great deals on your phone service STOP AT THIS LOCATION. Ask for (Alfredo or Lus)!!!  We now have Netflix on all of my devices, and I didn't get that at AT&T... and paying a (WHOLE LOT MORE), NOW with all my phones at one carrier, I'm saving big-time MONEY!!!  I'm satisfied!!!

Instead of working on providing great phone service to its customers, T-Mobile has decided to cave and virtue signal its support for anti-free speech anarchists by withdrawing advertising for the Tucker Carlson program. Anti-free speech is pure fascism. I stand with Tucker and against anti-free speech fascists...Looks like I need a new service.

Today I went to a T-Mobile store and I showed 
t mobile representative my old phone we found out I need to buy a new one. I said okay I have no choice I have to do it because I am using it for work. Alex the representative she told me that you need to wait 2 hours to activate I waited 2 hours nothing happened. I went back to store after 2 hours and again after waiting the guy told me to be patient and it may take 24 hours I said you told me to wait 2 hours and now I have to wait 24 hours. Waw. I said. I asked the guy please I need my 158$ back plus the cover 30$. He surprised me he said we will take 50$ abd give the rest of your money. I got mad I told him it is only 2 hours and it wasn't my mistake here is the phone and make it work he said that is policy. I said it is hiden fees I just bought a new phone with no services and the t mobile is taking 50$ for no reason and no services. I asked can I speak to Manager. The manger took my phone went to his room inside came back after chatting he said Wait 2 hours more . this second waiting for 2 hours started at 3 pm now time is 8 pm and no services yet. I just called customer service and they took my number to call me back the time is 8:13 pm and still waiting. I lost Today almost 200$ to buy this phone plus I lost other 250 from my work. 
Today date is Sat, June. 13. 2020
Don't use T mobile they have bad customer service, Hidden fees  even it is not your fault you still have to pay them. Poor Technical support. 
At the end you tell them I would like to return the phone I just bought with no service they will say ohh yea no problem but you have to pay.

If I could give this company a zero I would they deserve zero stars they are the worst company I have ever seen. I transferred from Sprint to them which they are buying out and Sprint has a better network system and better customer service than T-Mobile could ever imagine being. They did nothing but lie to me, scam me, and overcharge me To earn my business I didn’t know I was being overcharged until it was too late. They told me if I turned in a iPhone 7 or newer, which I had a 7+ in perfect condition looked like and worked like brand new I just wanted to upgrade during my switch since I was allowed to turn in this phone to get a iPhone 11 for free. However it wasn’t free they charged me they screwed me over they took my promotion away a month after getting my plan they have done nothing but lie and tell me oh I’m sorry but we’re still going to charge you. I never had over three bars for my service usually it was two no matter where I was. And because of all the problems I’ve had with T-Mobile I’ve switched to another company and now they’re making me pay for the entire phone instead of the 300 that I was going to have to pay even though I was told the phone would be for free. All I know is I don’t recommend this company to anyone it’s the worst company if you think about going T-Mobile turn around and run for your life.

T-mobile has a lot of fun perks that make it seem like your getting something really fun and exciting... but their network is quite terrible! No service at all in rural areas, on back roads, even in some suburban areas. We have an entire neighborhood paying for service but not getting any mobile internet or having it very limited or super slow for over a week now. I had to buy an internet pass from xfinitywifi. At least with Verizon I had a VERY reliable network, sure...it cost me an arm, a leg, and a kidney (j/k)  but I didn’t need the extra perks of netflix, T-Mobile Tuesday’s give aways , etc... I had reliable mobile internet without question. I have truly enjoyed T-Mobile’s affordable pricing, and their customer service is always super friendly but if their mobile internet issues and network issues are not fixed soon, we may be going back to Verizon.

I called customer service when I had problems with my messages carrying over from my old phone after changing from Verizon to T-Mobile. My issue was very complex but the lady who generously helped me, Aimee number: 177260548 , was so patient and understanding of my problem! Very impressed with the great customer service over the phone.

Went to T-Mobile store #4808 at 5848 W Central Ave Toledo to activate a phone and port number to it. Was on Sprint monthly billing plan and wanted to go to a prepaid plan on a phone I had purchased. Paid for first month of service and did paperwork. Counter rep had problems getting number to port over and called T-mobile help desk for assistance they hung up on (first red flag) him while trying to resolve. Assured me that phone would become activated in the next 24 to 48 hours. 48 hours came and went with no service on new phone and no contact regarding lack of service by T-Mobile, (another service shortfall). Returned from out of state on the 11th and contacted the store regarding no service, was told they couldn't help and suggested I call 611 from the new phone for the service department, Sprint customer service answered and couldn't help but gave me a number for customer service at T-mobile. (why did the store tell me to call 611, seems they don't know how to fix problems?) T-mobile service person said the problem was the stores to fix. I decided at that point to simply cancel service as no one I had dealt with thus far had the competence to solve a problem, what if another issue happened in the future? Went to the store again to get a refund, rep at the counter messed with his computer pad, inputting transaction details and said he was having problems. He said he had all the details necessary to process a refund and I asked him to contact me when that was completed. Having heard nothing I called later in the day and said if I had no information by 3 pm further action would be taken. No contact was ever made with me that day. Today is the 13th, the 7th day without being provided service or a refund for the service I paid for. When I went to the store today to once again insist to refund my payment, I was told that prepaid services are non-refundable. NO SERVICE WAS STARTED. I have been defrauded, I am curious how many others are facing the same predicament.
	I have found a provider with the skill set to competently complete this transaction and want a refund of the money taken for a service never provided. I should receive some compensation for the 3-4 hours I have wasted visiting the store for resolution and calling and being on hold with various representatives who brought me no closer to solving the problem but did effectively pass the buck to another who could waste my time.

T-Mobile should stick to selling cellular phones and plans and stay out of politics.  Our nation was founded on freedom of speech but our country is becoming more like China's where if you don't tow the party line you will be blacklisted.  Tucker Carlson is the most viewed news program on cable TV and he often brings up some very good points and unlike mainstream 'news' he doesn't mimic what the party says, he actually has a unique viewpoint.  Too bad if you don't always like what he says, nobody is going to agree with him or you 100% of the time but when you get blackmailed you fold your tail between your legs and run to the safe place and cancel your advertising like the party masters tell you to.
The worst. Don’t get it
I back Tucker . Just switched to Consumer Cellular for half the price and better service.
I will never use your service again.  I stand with tucker!

If I could give 0 stars I would. For being a communication company, they have the worst communication I have ever seen. We have spent over 8 hours on the phone not including the 3 trips to the store to resolve a jump on demand issue. We have been promised calls backs within a certain time window and this never happened. Every time I call I have to explain the entire scenario again and you can never speak with the same person you did before . I called the store manager and she was no help either . Worst company ever . Do not waste your time or money with them . They have lost a valuable customer of 5 years because of lack of communication .

T-Mobile Store at 310 N Congress Ave, Boynton Beach, FL, 33426
Phone number  (561) 737-7349

I went into this T-Mobile store to add a OnePlus 8 to my new activated T-Mobile service. The Rep brought out the last OnePlus 8 phone in stock and every time I went to look at OnePlus 8 he told me to stand 6 feet away. The way the Rep control this situation I understood, this is the world we now live in.  Because of this, I was never given the opportunity to take a closer look at the phone I was buying. When I got home I found a crack on the back of the phone. I went back the store to explain this to a manager and I was told that the policy is that once the phone was out the T-Mobile door there is nothing he could do. I know I didn't do this. Since I was never given the opportunity to take look at time of purchased, this policy doesn't apply to my situation. The box was not seal when I got home. I told the rep that I will take care of everything  because I need get the information from Fi-Google with the porting information. I repeated myself,Please do not anything I will do this myself. I do not understand how I got a phone in box that was not sealed in box.

I was offered by the Store Manager, since I did take the insurance on the phone, he will credit me the deductible. With this scenario I will be paying $16 per month with only one claim left for the year. The phone works, I can't waste a claim on a working phone.

I purchase a brand new phone, brand new phones should not have cracks.

The old policy doesn't match with the stores new policy with distancing. This could have been avoid by putting up Plexiglas dividers, provide disposable gloves. I ask another rep why they have not taken these measures: "They do not want to spend the money"  This phone had the crack prior to me taking ownership. Avoid this store till they could figure a way to get the old policy to work with the new policy.
Called t-mobile customer service. I was put on hold. it is almost 1 hr 26 minutes now and it is going on....

T-Mobile should be sued for utilizing the word “expert” as a relates to its employees. The only thing that these employees are good at is transferring you to a supervisor that has no authority, and promising a returned phone call that never occurs. You can guarantee that you will receive an apology even before you finish expressing your concerns. I am convinced that the customer solutions handbook states to apologize every 15 seconds during the call or chat session.

I've called 3 times in the last 2 days and was waiting to speak to a representative for more than 30 mins and gave up and ended up hanging up. I got a new phone from t mobile and text messages only work when it feels like it.

LITERALLY SAVE YOURSELF THE HASSLE AND GO ANYWHERE ELSE. Horrible customer service, cellular service is laughable, will sell you a broken device and offer no solutions to help. They do everything they can to NOT help their customers and clearly do not care about keeping customers.

I am very much disappointed in tmobile service. My family have  had their service since 2002. I called them to ask for a credit back to me for first time in 18 years for a call that by mistake I made internationally and their represetative named kim on april after talking to her supervisor agreed to credit my account. Waited for two months nothing happend. called them back on july 8, 2020 talked to Travis and his sppervisor Taylor. They totally denied it and made me feel so bad by saying that I  , the loyal customer, were never promised a credit. I felt so down/bad and will change my carrier and will take other actions too (etc. BBB). I feel that my right and principal has been violated and  degraded after being their loyal customer for 18 years.

I was having a lot of random service issues after getting a new phone. Turns out it was just some weird settings and Henry helped me fix them in one minute! He's probably the nicest customer service person I've ever talked to.
Promises not achieved and lines with very poor reception.

Tmobile service is horrible.  I have constant dropped calls, calls that don't go through,  internet connection problems in my own home (router and modem brand new top of the line), text messages that I don't get and ones that don't send. They have replaced sim cards and then said there was nothing else they could do. They have never solved a problem I have had ever. Better no service at all than having the aggravation of Tmobile

edits.text: T-Mobile constantly drops calls. The eve internet fades in and out constantly. Switching to T-Mobile from Verizon was the worst Choice I've ever made. If I could return the iPhone 11 and get my money back and switch back to Verizon I would do it yesterday

text: Have been with them for over 3 yrs and everything was great until after paying my phones off with them last fall. Right  after that my account had an “authorized” charge in Houston for 2 newest model iPhone with all extras. I notified their fraud department and charges were taken off of my acct. Then again this week a female walked into a store here in my city by my house, and again bought 2 newest model iPhones with all extras. Both cases these woman acted and even signed documents as if it was me! And after the first theft there was a high alert added to my account which clearly didn’t work... Apparently I don’t even have the right to see the video recording of their faces - due to security reasons - even though both these crooks know who I am and even my address but my security just doesn’t concern anyone!  Lots of people telling me that it was an ‘inside’ job and I am done with this headache!

I would just like to give a shout out to the T-Mobile store on Nellis and Charleston it's manager is doing a wonderful job and he should be commended for that I have been to several stores and this one is absolutely the best!!

edits.text: been with T-Mobile for several months now for the first time I have had nothing but great experience with them from the time I walked in the door till now they've always been prompt courteous everything they said they were going to do they did even when my phone was working incorrectly and I couldn't figure it out they managed to correct it or have the phone returned under warranty I just couldn't have asked for better customer service anywhere then with T-Mobile I was pleasantly surprised. Great team of people to deal with over phone & in the store

text: Their customer service sucks. You can't do anything from their stores so I tried calling them. I tried to cancel my service and they hung up on me. I am now with SimpleMobile. They are half the price and their service is very good. I hate T-Mobile and I do not recommend them to anyone.

I do not get some of the bad reviews. I have had T mobile for over 10 years and they have been great, customer service, price, and overall service is the best in my opinion.  I do recomend T Mobile to my friends and family.

T-Mobile sales people tell you one thing when you are signing up, then afterwards you discover nothing they told you is true, and customer service simply says they should not have told you that,   Their technical customer service is the worse.  In the sales office they showed me a coverage map which showed excellent coverage in my neighborhood, can’t get a signal outside my house!

NEVER go to T Mobile, I bought a plan with them of 4 lines, at Store # 2040 in Hialeah gardens Florida. I did a trade in of an iPhone 8 Plus, and they set a monthly payment for 7 dollars and some cents for the new iPhone, when I reviewed my bill I realized they have charged me 29.99 dollars every month and I have called more than 15 times to their customer service they have told me that in the store where I bought the plan they applied a business promotion and I don't have any business, to make the story shorter I just got out of the store where I bought the plan, the manager 's name is Reinhard is located at 3311 w 80th street suite 10A Hialeah Florida 33018. The manager was very rude and all the employees there, I was waiting for him more than 45 min and he just told me to call again customer service, I asked him to call him and give me a solution right there but he denied to help me, He called the police, and they came and I explained the situation. The police told me I can sue the company because that was very unfair. Pleaseeee, this could happens to any of you, do not do any business with T Mobile, they are real stealers. Never again do business with them, so embarrassed with the situation that involved the police and still don't have any response from them.

OMGEE I TRUCKING HATE T-mobile so mad DONT GO TO THEM !! I so wish I was still with SPRINT !! T-mobile takes your money then give you a run around !!! SPRINT WILL NEVER DO THAT TO YOU !! I WOULDNT GO TO T-mobile ever again I HAVE HAD PROBLEMS LITERALLY SINCE THE 1st day I bought my phone THE WORKERS NEVER KNOW ANYTHING OR CAN NEVER GIVE YOU AN ANSWER THEY ARE TRUCKING  HORRIBLE!!!

I have Metro by T-Mobile. And so far I love it. Always good signal. The employees at their store were very nice and helpful.I had to call them about my bill's due date and they fixed it and gave me 10gs of hotspot for having ro2 be put on hold. Which was only for 90 seconds

I went in T Mobile today, 3 June, 2020. A very nice young lady informed me of the protocol (mask, distancing). She saw that I was waiting for a bit, so she took care of me as I was next in line. She was polite and very helpful, even though there was a lot of pressure on her because there were people waiting, and there were few  employees. Her name is Marium in the  TMobile store 8681. Marium and Andrea were holding the fort down! A couple of the customers were quite rude while waiting to enter the store. Both of these young ladies kept their cool and handled the two of us inside the store while going back and forth outside to explain to the people they would be with them as soon as possible.
Yeah. There's only a 14 day grace period if you don't want their service anymore. Thats with all cellphone services. Don't by anybody's word. I usually read the bylaws. Just FYI

San Antonio, TX Hardy Oak store!

Never again! Do not go here! Military family here, My husband and I thought we'd give T-Mobile another shot since they have great deals for military now, we switched from Verizon. We got 2 new phones and while in store I specifically asked Paul and the young lady helping us if we'd get a 100% refund if the service didn't work for us. 'Oh yah, for sure!' was their response... no mention of restock fees or non-refundable activation fees. We had dropped calls and shoddy service in all the areas we frequent, we were disappointed to have to return the phones 4 days later. I went in the store Paul wasn't there but the young lady was, her attitude completely different toward me this time around now that I wanted to return the phones and would hardly speak to me. SHOCKER... the story changed, we now owed a $50 restock fee for each phone (which I get) but 'you can call customer service to request a refund for the $20 activation and $10 sim card'. So I got to waste time calling customer service for them to tell me that only the store can refund those fees at the time of cancellation! AWESOME! That 100% refund did not include the $160 they kept! They could've told me that at the start instead of just telling me whatever to make a sale!!!
Go to this store if you love to be misinformed and have your time wasted!!! My experience at this store has confirmed that I will never do business with T-Mobile again.

Buyer beware. Read all ratings before proceeding. Written in the contract you sign in the beginning, no suing. If you separate from them, you'll want to sue. Sent to collections immediately upon cancelation of account. Didn't use service for 3 months after porting out numbers. Got a 500+ dollar bill even after taking with customer care. My credit score is well over 800. Not a dirt bag. These guys are aholes that look to screw you. After being hassled, paid the bill in full, thinking this would preserve my credit. After 1 month, received a call saying they were sending me a credit of 300+ dollars, they made a mistake. I want interst, I'm appalled at being sent to collections on day 1 of leaving. These people don't give a sh_t about you. Sent letter wanting me back, ya right! Would rather burn myself with a hot poker. Good luck and bend over, you're taking one for the "team".

If I could mark as ZERO stars I would!!! They are not upfront with you about anything! We finally ported out numbers out at the beginning of the cycle and they still charged the entire month of service for 5 phones that they only serviced for 1 week of the month but they said oh well that is our policy! I would NEVER RECOMMEND T-mobile to ANYONE! BUYER Beware!

Be careful when switching your cell phone carrier to T-Mobile because of their promotion. When I switched my carrier from Verizon to T-Mobile, the rep didn't tell me to be eligible for the promo I need to port my number. I didn't realize this requirement until I went to check my rebate status.

I would not trust this company at all.  I was told that I was getting a free I-phone, due to a promotion, when signing up for an account.  3 weeks later, the phone stopped working.  It was never repaired or replaced.  I cancelled my account.  Now, I'm being charged over $400 for this phone.  They lied to me and never resolved my issue.  I'm forced to pay this money to prevent collections.

They discriminate against people with medical conditions that affect ability to breathe. Millions of Americans have trouble breathing and cannot wear a mask. We are now banned from many stores such as t-mobile. Scumbags work there avoid!

Huge thank you to Allie at the Berlin, NJ T mobile store (115 NJ-73 #70) who was the only person willing to hep me. Managers, supervisors, no one would help, but she persisted and was finally able to get me the credits I deserved after T mobile failed to credit me properly for returned equipment and cancellation of account set-up.  If it wasn't for her, it would never have been resolved.  Thank you Allie!  You went above and beyond and it is appreciated.  Too bad not all T mobile workers are as dedicated as you!

Why is it that knowbody does the job they are oaid to do? Spent almost two hours back and forth to T-Mobile stores to get a phone upgrade transfer to the old phone and left with employees telling us you can do it at home yourself. Flower Mound Texas. On top of that my mother who is in her seventies and has the family plan on five to seven phones has been being robbed buy T-Mobile constantly until I younger person walks in and has to be a basically insulted buy lazy unqualified people that then correct the problem instantly yet continue to Rob peoples unless they bring it. Like Verizon and most companies you people exist up a bunch of lazy greedy pathetic individuals that only worried about their paycheck and doing the least amount possible to get it. But you advertise all this b******* to get somebody in the door to take advantage of. Only due to the mass population is why garbage conglomerates like yourselves continue to operate with corporate greed. It's a means to an end. Thank God some people pay attention and actually study and know the laws and can go back through with mandatory records being held by companies like yours. Not only do you Bill people way more than they signed up for. Not only do you rob people with your b******* insurance plans and everything else that nobody can actually utilize unless they make a scene about it. Now you expect everybody to do your employees jobs at the same time. Truly a pathetic business. And a 6 year old with Down Syndrome can see why. Real businessman retire and these Generations now are just lazy greedy pathetic weak individuals that don't do their job which means down the chain nobody's doing their job and at the end of the day the people that pay the bills which are the customers are the ones constantly getting f***** by scumbags like yourselves. I hope Karma destroys everyone of you and your families you are f****** truly the trash of the planet and I cannot wait till the day comes where are disgusting weak pathetic trash like yourselves get that with by real people. Go fuc yourself and I hope the worst on you and your entire f****** gene pool
T-mobile has the slowest internet in the world

As I write this TMOBILE is unable to PORT my current cell phone number from SPRINT (which they now own since April 20, 2020) to a prepaid TMOBILE new account (active) on a new SAMSUNG A20.  I am no stranger to PORT (number transfers) on various carriers and there is NO REASON why they can’t accomplish this.  Their USA customer service is quite good BUT they do not do the porting, seem there is another branch which does that and I get connected with Mexicans.  They have very little control over what they can and cannot do and they keep dropping the phone line and they cannot call me back.  This is not the TMOBILE i used to use some 8 to 15 years ago.  If they cant get this right, I will go to Verizon (although more costly, they know how to do number ports.)

If i could give T-Mobile 0 stars I would. Rating system wouldn’t let me. I signed up for T-Mobile early March. Upon porting my number customer service cancelled my service with att then hung up on me. Couldn’t call back...had no service...REALLY. People in hospital at the time. Went to T-Mobile and they said because done on line, they couldn’t help me. Begged att to reinstate us. If you have GOOD SERVICE from another carrier don’t switch!!! You’ll be very very sorry. Been calling now for 12 weeks looking for my refund. 12 phone calls 12 people and supervisors promising refunds. Reporting them to BBB and states attorney general...they don’t care, why?, because they ARE THE SCUM OF THE EARTH.  Just a horror of a communications network.

T mobile sucks. I mailed in my phone for an upgrade and their warehouse can not find the phone so they are charging me for it. Wanted to cancel the entire plan now they are charging me for the upgraded phone because I haven’t had it for 2 months. They are trash. Left them as of today.

I have been a T-Mobile customer since 2004,  Thats 16 years,  2 months ago I just got a $1200 , S20 plus5 G , what crappy  5g service, there is no 5g, i have to change the band down to 3g, very little internet, if any, what a mistake buying a 5g phone, beware,  very disappointed

Having T-Mobile as my service provider has been a nightmare. They say you have a support team to help you but the call wait times are ridiculous and they are reluctant to provide assistance. I called for 3 months to switch my plan because my bill was way too high and would have to wait for 3 hours before throwing in the towel and giving up. When I finally got through, they were not helpful and the woman was stand-offish to help me lower my plan and not understanding about lowering my bill and why paying too much for months is not my fault when they won’t answer their calls to lower my bill. She set up a call tike 3 days later after my case would be “reviewed” but I never received a call. When I called back there was no report of her setting up a time for further review and I had to set up a time for the next day to call about the same issue. I’ve been trying to switch and they put you in a trap-like scenario by making you jump through all these hoops just to get the phone you paid and to cancel my service. I’m not even contracted. If you are thinking T-Mobile, don’t. They charge too much for the less than adequate service they provide and don’t care about your experience, only you continuing flow of money. I’d rate 0-5 if I could.

My Samsung Note 10 was not allowing me to put in my pin unless it was double . In addition the voice continued to speaking on various times during the process of entering the pin and accessing different applications. 
As a fed-up customer i tolk the phone to t-mobile on Rockside Rd, Cleveland,  Ohio where a extremely, knowledgeable and easy going young lady Takara knew immediately what the problem was.   Takara relayed the best service I've have ever received from a cell phone company that on and off the phone. When I asked what caused the problems. Takara as well as her manger didn't know . However, Takara made sure i knew how to fix it in case it happened again and also let me know i can come back for anymore assistance I may need. I left the store thanking God for such a wonderful person 🙏 assisting me.

TMobile is the absolute worst carrier in Kansas. Very spotty coverage, customer service MIGHT make a trouble report, only if you complain a LOT! The tmo stores can do nothing to help except sell you a new phone (RIPOFF)

T-Mobile is really a rip off for the kind of service they provide. I have an unlimited data plan but every day on like a 5th of a new months it tells me that I used a certain amount of data so until the cycle resets (on the 27th of each month) the connection might be slow. Which it isn’t the best anyways. Lately it’s been worse than ever and I’m definitely thinking about switching to another provider.

I met a lovely lady at TMobile store in Hyattsville MD, she was so pleasant, knowledgeable about the services provided by TMobile. She was so patient, friendly and easy going, her name is Stella. She never for 1minute frowned nor complained. Please everyone if you ever go to the TMobile at Hyattsville ask for STELLA the perfect customer service personnel.
I give her a million stars🌟🌟 🌟🌟 🌟 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
Keep up the good work Stella

T-Moble is the worst Cell Carrier there is , Having two iPhones and paid $1000.00 for each and wanted to trade them both in for iPhone 11 pro’s they quoted giving me $150.00 for each. I feel that’s a rip off and poor , very poor service. T-Mobile should respect people a little better than this, but there are better deals out there than this.....Verizon- Apple- ATT offer BETTER deals. Do not let T-Moble rip you off !!!!!

I am a customer with T-Mobile since 2017.  I want to warn everyone to BEWARE IF YOU BRING YOUR DEVICE YOU ASK FOR COVERAGE!!
I transferred from another carrier to T-Mobile, I just found out when I moved my device from ATT to T-Mobile they never put or asked if I wanted a warrantee on the devices.  You don’t think about it because it’s a little confusing when they say keep your number.  The Reps never asks if you want coverage.   I did not realize that this was a practice until today.  I had my iPad moved over 10/19.  Today it stopped working I called T-Mobile I was told i had no coverage.  I assume everything included the warranty.  As I checked my bill from 2017 I never had coverage on any devices!!!!!I had to buy another Phone when my originally Phone mysteriously went into a carrier block after the merger.  The rep told me I had no coverage, I was in a rush so I upgraded. She just asked if I want to keep my number.    Not once after 3 transaction was told or asked if I had coverage.  CHECK TO MAKE SURE YOUR Equipment is covered.  Look your bill.

Me and my husband had been customers for almost 3 years. We had 3 lines and 2 galaxy watches. We bought the watches during a promo of BOGO. Also the iphone on our plan was suppose to be free, but they called the next day and said it was a mistake and phone was 500.00. We did not complain we just said nonproblem and paid it. It was time to upgrade and T Mobil was not willing to provide any good deals so we went to another carrier. When we called to pay off our equipment they said that that BOGO promo on our watches would be voided cause we were leaving and turning our service off. 
I spoke with a supervisor and stated my concerns regarding this matter and how it was not explained to us in that way. We wanted to do the right and pay off the iPhone and 1 watch (the other should have been free, plus they are over 1 year old)
The lady I spoke to was no help. She kept saying I'm sorry but the promo is voided if you drop us. How fair is that and what kind if customer service is that. I understand maybe we should have did a better job reading the fine print however the employees at the store should really explain this to their customers when they are purchasing promos that sound to good to be true! Basically I took it as either stay with T mobile or you have to pay more money! We will never get their service again. Lesson learned to read to fine print and ask a million questions!!! T mobile you lost our business!!!

TMobile has some of the worst customer service over phone. The problems started when I transferred my old phone number from other provider. I called them and first very helpful man explained to me that there were transferring problems and the easiest way to fix is to get a new number. No problem. Got it in 2 hours as promised. It worked great for a few days, then I lost service on the new number completely. OK. Called them again on Sunday afternoon. They said that my number was ACCIDENTALLY ASSIGNED TO SOME OTHER ACCOUNT and to get service back I need to GET A NEW NUMBER AGAIN! Never got service. Had to call them again later and was told to wait for 24 hours for techs to fix the problem.That's when I just paid monthly fee! OK. I've been waiting for 4 days now for a new number. Never got service back again. I've wasted hours on the phone trying to get them solve service issues. I'd rather get myself a new provider. Although, cancellation was easy, in 8 min the lady managed discontinue my both numbers and was very understandful. Can't say I liked the overall 6 month experience though.

This is the worst carrier you can find.  They couldn’t even figure out how to close an account, even after 3 trips into the store and many, many phone calls to customer service. This was obviously a ploy to continue billing for all the months they pleaded ignorance.
After 10+ years have to speak out.Bad customer services.

Was told my bill from pervious cell provide would be paid in full by T-Mobile. That didnt happen, then I was told I'd get $350 from the carrier freedom program. I got $67.47. They will lie, cheat & steal for a sell. I was told in order to get my Verizon bill paid for after I switch all I needed to do is send in my current phone. I had a 15 month old iphon xs max. So I sent it in thank the lord I sent it back signature required as they tried to tell me they never received it. Once I mention that I sent it in with signature req and that I had the person that signed for it if they'd like it. All the sudden the phone was there, that's the steal part. They literally tried to steal my phone! How many folks would just have use the label provided by T-Mobile. The lie part is when I signed up. I was flat out told that T-Mobile would pay any fees for early termination as well as any money that was owed for a device payment plan up to $450 bucks. NOPE! So that's how I found out that the carrier freedom program T-Mobile has would only pay $350. They would pay up to $350 buck if you had a qualifying trade in which I was told once again I did. So months go by and nothing. I logged into check on my Carrier Freedom progress tonight and see it has been process and paid. Opened the drop down menu and there was a staggering $67.47 buck that has been sent via card. They flat out cheated me out of my phone and did not do anything they said or promised. I have kept all the transcripts and everything on this and will be taking T-Mobile to court! Bottom line DO NOT SIGN UP WITH T-MOBILE! Lie, Cheat and Steal. They will bait and switch you. I may not end up with nothing but I'm sick and tired of these BILLION DOLLAR companies just flat out swindling folks!!!!!

If I could give them 0 star I would. T-mobile added an extra line on my account that I did not know about. I’ve been paying for it for almost a year. I called them about the situation they told me that I was paying for extra data I was using on top of what was given. What’s upsetting about the situation is they refused to give me my money back. They say that they can only reimburse me for four months. 

I’m really trying to hurt them. They just took my money because they can basically. I’m not going to let it go.

Honestly don't have much issue with the service itself. I'm realistic in my expectations that my service won't be perfect all the time everywhere and I get that. It's the same with nearly every service provider. My problem is that whenever I need to get a new device, I go into the store and they tell me its "buy one, get one" and I actually do end up putting the cost of one phone down, but they lie and instead set up an equipment plan, split the money I put down to each of the phones and instead of doing a full credit, they set a promotion code on it to discount the phones instead so while it looks like its a credit, its not a credit that equals one of the phones being free. When I call customer service, I get the run around basically saying "Sorry but I can't do anything about that. I'm sorry the store said that." I'm not mad at the customer service rep as I don't expect her to do the work of miracles but I have learned that going forward I'll just buy a phone outright if I need a new one and just move the SIM over.
They have the worst costumer service ever. I have been waiting for an hour to refill my account with no answer. Definitely changing to another phone carrier.

Well for the past two days I have had the worst experience with t mobile customer service.  when I dialed 611 I was connected to a rep who obviously did not know what he was asking me to do on my phone.  He kept putting me on hold and in the end messed up my phone.  I called again today and got someone who seemed to have some sense but the call kept dropping and in the end after holding on for hours I got nowhere they left me high and dry.  

I consider this to be poor service especially after increasing my bill this month with an extra $4.75 which they claim is an increase on insurance.  At a time like this when people are out of jobs they are increasing the phone bill!!
I am considered a high risk because of the epidemic and I need my phone so I had to leave my home for the first time since the lock-in to find a t-mobile office, and thank God my phone is now working..

These people are the worst thieves and liars I have EVER seen in a company. I switched to T-Mobile back in December. The salesman ASSURED me that my total bill would only be $65.00 per month for 2 lines. And I could trade my existing phone in for a $450 rebate.
But he lied to me.
He NEVER told me that this price would be if I had auto-pay for both lines, and he also stared to charge for for insurance for each phone, which I NEVER Signed up for.
So now my bill has gone from the promised $65 per month to $115.00 per month. AND I had to pay for the phone which was another $29 per month. That is more than what I was paying at AT&T.
And today I just learned that this butt*&^% salesman lied to me about my ability to get a rebate for my phone. The lady today told me ( 5 Months after the fact) that my phone that they took as a trade-in didn't qualify for a rebate.
These people are Liars and Crooks... STAY AWAY!!!!! They will cheat you and lie to your face to sign you up.
T-mobile is an absolute joke. They are crooks and have shady business practices. Please avoid this company at all costs if you can.
Website never works .They must have the worst web developers. I would fire them ina second. Slow, bad gateway messages and you cannot use the website. Terrible.

If I could give negative stars I would. I used to think they were great until they told me I have to put $500 down and then I waited a month to get the money and now they raised it after talking to them for 45 mins to $981.00. What a joke!!;

I have been a TMobile customer for over 13 years. I am disappointed that not 1, but 2 Tmobile reps, lied to me. Management will not resolve this issue.  $34 dollars in unknown charges later, the issue is still not resolved. They are not a trustworthy company

My elderly sister tried to cancelled in December and got a bill in January, called and cancelled in January and told them the date and time and name of employee of the December cancellation, She had already paid the December bill. Got another bill in February, called their cancellation number again giving them again the dates, times and names. They said sorry but their records show we owe $110 for the billing cycle since their records don't show we cancelled. We said cancel again. Just received a letter apologizing for all the problems and said they are prorating $110, so we now owe $56.50. The prorated the number should be zero since they said we only owed $110 back in March. On top of that they say we need to call the number (the number we have already called 4 months in a row) to cancel again. What kind of despicable company is this? I detest people who try to take advantaged of the elderly.

I had been a T-mobile customer for 16 yrs and had no real problems with them during that time, few months ago I moved and was traveling more and was not happy with service coverage so I changed providers..I canceled my service end of Feb and was told I was to late for billing cycle so would still owe a full bill for March with no prorate? after some arguing with their none customer service team I gave up. she told me my final bill would be in April.. today April 24th I received another  bill from T-Mobile??? so again I called their none customer service and was told I only canceled 1 of my lines??? I did have 2 lines, 1 line I was not using so I only ported the # I was still using.. Again T-Mobile said nothing they can do and I would still be getting another bill to pay after I canceled my service 3 months ago.. bunch of crooks. SO T-MOBILE YOU CAN TAKE MY MONEY AND SHOVE IT UP YOUR A$$!! TERRIBLE CUSTOMER SERVICE

Terrible service and value. If your bill goes 1 day without being paid, they render your phone and internet to a point that all phones on your plan are useless. This should be illegal.
The sales people are trained to lie and say whatever it will take to get you to sign a contract or “payment plan” for your devices. Reimbursed with commissions for their deceit.

The worst ISP I have subscribed with. It is almost weeks now and I didn’t receive my router. The customer service is unwilling to help. Each time the same phrases are used without knowing when the problem to be resolved. When I tried to cancel they said I cannot despite that I didn’t get the equipment and I did not start the service. I have been with T Mobile for about twenty years.  They sold me an S 4 that was supposed to have internet that never did. Only when I got a newer phone did I get internet.  So I paid for internet for about 18 months and did not have it. 
If you can get to an American person in customer service, the service is decent.  The ones in the Phillipines and India are not and they can do more damage than good so I will not talk to them anymore. So if you have a problem and need customer service, call in daytime in USA or don't.  
I currently would like a newer phone.  Our phone service where I am is not great. There are alot of dead spots in the area that I am in.   I have talked to T Mobile now about 3 times about a new phone.  They will not discount the phones to a 20 year customer but they are giving new customers with their current phones a $200 gift card.  This stinks.  
This will probably be the reason that I finally leave T Mobile and also due to their spotty service. 
Plus my service slows down after I use 50 GBs a month due to prioritization.   Meaning, my plan is a discount plan and they do not care if I stay with them.

I know I switched phone services during the worst possible time (COVID-19) but I truly did not anticipate such a horrible experience. It took 2 weeks to get a phone, 21/2 weeks to get service, another 1/2 week to get the texts on the right phone, hours & hours & hours of waiting on hold. Every time I called was at least a 2 hour ordeal. One day I was on the phone with them for 4 1/2 hours talking to no less than 7 people! Twice a supervisor has promised to me the would call me back the next day. (Never happened). Now I'm been on hold for 2 hours and talked to the support person several times, after saying I will continue to hold, she hung up on me! These are the dates I've called: 3/22/2020 , March 26, March 30, April 1, April 6, today April 17. I have talked to 2 supervisors, Chris and Katherine. I've talked to numerous customer care peole, Razel, Pablo, among others. Today Layla, who kept trying to have me give permission for them to call me back & when I refused hung up on me!
I don't understand why they are so short staffed; lots of stores were closed; why don't they hire some of those people to man phones. I wish I had never made a switch!
